description: A compliance officer needs to add a new executive to the company's insider trading list, restricting when they can trade company stock.

nodes.task_description: Identify the new executive who needs to be added to the restricted list.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the new employee.

nodes.task_description: Add the executive to the insider list in the compliance system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the person to the list.

nodes.task_description: Send a notification to the executive explaining the trading restrictions and blackout periods.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a clear communication to the executive about their new obligations.
